step-file.title: Load Bundle and Initialize Strike Counter

step.title: Load Bundle and Initialize Strike Counter
step.goal: Read the entire bundle into working memory and initialize session state for the D-phase, including the foundational-reversal strike counter from Lock 31.

substep.title: Locate the Bundle
substep.ask:
Which ticket bundle should I run the D-phase on?
Paste the bundle directory path (under {shared_folder}/tickets/{slug}/), OR paste the ticket file path.
The bundle should already have a Q↔R Readiness Summary section in the ticket body (written by ticket-grill). If it does not, D-phase is premature — re-run ticket-grill first.
substep.action:
Validate the path. Store {{session.bundle_dir}}, {{session.ticket_path}}, {{session.research_path}}, {{session.questions_path}}, {{session.worklog_path}}.
Verify the WORKLOG contains "## Q↔R Readiness Summary". If absent, halt and direct the user to ticket-grill.

substep.title: Read Bundle Files
substep.action:
Read ALL bundle files completely. From the ticket file: - Frontmatter: aliases, tags (primary = tags[0]), children (existing DR links), owner, status From the worklog file: - Body: Q↔R Readiness Summary section in full
From the research file: - All turn entries (factual findings accumulated by ticket-grill) - All prototype findings (sections starting with "### Prototype:")
From the questions file: - The Orient Summary (from ticket-orient) - Every Q&A entry (Q1, Q2, R3, ...) from ticket-grill turns - Note which questions were resolved with which answers and which alternatives were rejected with what reasoning
Store in session: - {{session.primary_tag}} - {{session.slug}} - {{session.readiness_summary}} (the Q↔R Readiness Summary content) - {{session.research_findings}} (synthesized list of factual findings) - {{session.qa_entries}} (list of resolved questions and answers) - {{session.linked_drs}} (list of DR aliases from frontmatter children)

substep.title: Read Linked DRs
substep.action:
For each DR alias in {{session.linked_drs}}, resolve the file path and read the DR completely. Capture: - Title, decision, context, why - Whether the DR was created in this session or a prior one - The DR's "considered options" if present
DRs constrain the design: their decisions cannot be revisited in D-phase without strike-counter escalation. Surfacing them explicitly here means the agent does not propose alternatives that contradict locked DRs.
Store as {{session.locked_decisions}}: list of {alias, decision, why}.

substep.title: Initialize Strike Counter
substep.action:
Set {{session.foundational_strikes}} = 0.
Scope of the counter: - Per-session only (no persistence in frontmatter; spec Lock 32) - Resets at the start of every ticket-design invocation - Increments only on FOUNDATIONAL reversals (defined in step 4) - Resumption from compaction loses the count; this is acceptable per the earlier-locked design decision
Also initialize {{session.strike_log}} = [] — a list of per-strike notes for inclusion in the questions file if a strike fires.

substep.title: Display Load Summary
substep.output:
D-phase bundle loaded: - Slug: {{session.slug}} - Primary tag: {{session.primary_tag}} - Q↔R Readiness Summary: present ({{readiness_summary_line_count}} lines) - Research findings: {{count}} turns synthesized - Q&A entries: {{count}} resolved questions - Linked DRs: {{count}} ({{aliases if any}}) - Foundational strike counter: 0/3
Proceeding to design proposal.

section.title: Why re-read everything
section.description: D-phase may run in a fresh context (compaction, new session). The bundle on disk IS the handoff state per spec §11. Reading the full bundle here means subsequent steps work from a complete understanding without re-reading. Skipping this read leads to design proposals that contradict findings the agent never saw.

section.title: DR awareness is non-negotiable
section.description: Every linked DR represents a hard-to-reverse decision the user already approved. Proposing alternatives to a DR's decision is a foundational reversal — strike counter fires. The agent must load DRs in 1c to AVOID accidentally proposing such alternatives in step 2.

section.title: The strike counter does NOT carry across sessions
section.description: Per Lock 32, custom frontmatter fields are forbidden. The strike counter therefore lives only in session state. A user who compacts and restarts ticket-design has a fresh counter. This is a known trade-off: an adversarial user could reset the counter by force, but the prior reversals are logged in the questions file and ticket-verify will catch foundational drift downstream.
